---
name: Suggestion
about: Propose a change or addition (open an issue before any pull request)
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["type: feature", "status: needs triage"]
---

## What and why
What you are proposing, and the question it helps answer.

## Fit with the project ethos
This project lives or dies by a few invariants. Please confirm the proposal respects
them:

- [ ] Every new number would trace to a citable source (or explicit derivation) with a
      `REFERENCES.md` entry - no assumed values.
- [ ] It can be validated end to end, on real numbers and edge cases.
- [ ] It keeps the model a pure, seeded, deterministic fold, with pimas only as the skin.
- [ ] It adds no em-dash or emoji, and stays within one module's directory.
- [ ] It does not deepen nesting beyond what the question needs.

## Notes
Anything else worth knowing.
